intendedRole: Atmospheric background for solo room and shared solo sync mode.
layerStructure: SoloAuraField (core aura, veil, inner glow, sync overlay/host beacon)
reducedMotionExpectation: Switch to balanced/static quality; keep readability scrim and state labels.

intendedRole: Collective energy field signaling waiting/live/ended states.

layerStructure: Mapbox globe or fallback animation layer
Fullscreen top bar and selection preview card

reducedMotionExpectation: Fallback rendering or reduced pulse intensity while keeping data hierarchy and labels.
